avatarScaling.title: Ingano ya Avatar
avatarScaling.subtitle: Guhindura uburebure bwa avatar bikoresheje OSC ya VRChat by'ubwacyo — bikora kuri avatar iyo ari yo yose
avatarScaling.hotkeyHint: Buto zihutirwa (hotkeys) zikora ahantu hose (n'igihe VRChat ariyo ifite focus). Niba buto idashobora gufatwa, ushobora gukomeza gukoresha slider iri hejuru.
translator.title: Umusemuzi
translator.aiGrammarFix: Banza ukosore imyandikire ukoresheje AI (bikoresha utanga serivisi wa IntelliChat uri hejuru)
translator.note: Bikoreshwa n'uburyo bwo guhindura ururimi bwa chatbox ya Kwandika mu Gihe Nyakuri, ndetse na ho hose muri iyi porogaramu hagaragara uburyo bwo "Guhindura ururimi mbere yo kohereza."
liveTyping.title: Kwandika mu Gihe Nyakuri
liveTyping.subtitle: yohereza uko wandika, nk'uko chatbox ya VRChat ubwayo ikora
liveTyping.placeholder: Andika hano — ibi byohereza kuri chatbox mu buryo bwikora buri masegonda make uko wandika. Komeza kwandika nyuma y'inyuguti 144; VRChat izagaragaza '…' hamwe n'iherezo ry'ubutumwa bwawe.
liveTyping.translateLabel: Hindura ururimi mbere yo kohereza (bikoresha igenamiterere ry'Umusemuzi)
languagePicker.title: Hitamo Ururimi Rwawe
languagePicker.subtitle: Ushobora guhindura ibi nyuma mu Igenamiterere.
settingsLanguage.title: Ururimi
settingsLanguage.label: Ururimi rwa Porogaramu
